final:
module reg_with_enable (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    input [7:0] d,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 8'd0;
        end else if (en) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule
